Custom Yard Signs

Order High-Quality Lawn Signs Online

Decals.com is Now Partnering With Lawnsigns.com! - Save 10% on your Next Order

Decals.com has teamed up with LawnSigns.com to help you with all your yard sign needs! Click the button below to get started and save 10% on your next LawnSigns.com order with promo code: LS10!ŌĆŗ

Click Here to Order Custom Yard Signs

Clicking the link above will take you to our sister site, Lawnsigns.com. If you have any items in your Decals.com cart, we suggest you check out now to avoid losing the items in your cart.

Customer Reviews ... Reviews

ŌśģŌśģŌśģŌśģŌśģ

Don't take our word for it! See what others are saying.

See Our Reviews More Reviews

Why Choose Decals.com?

Customer Service

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

Made in the USA

All of our products are proudly made and manufactured here in the USA!

 

Fast Turnaround

Standard turnaround time ships your product within three business days.

Track Your Order

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary live order tracking system.

Yard Sign Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

Product Information

What are yard signs?

Yard signs are small, flexible signs usually stuck into the ground with metal stakes. Made from corrugated plastic, they are commonly used by real estate agents, businesses, politicians, and for events like birthdays and lawn care. They work well both indoors and outdoors.

What material are your signs printed on?

Our signs are printed on 4mm corrugated plastic. This material is similar to cardboard but more durable, with hollow flutes that make the signs strong and lightweight

Can I order custom-shaped yard signs?

Currently, we don’t offer custom-shaped yard signs.

What are the most common sizes for yard signs?

The most common sizes for yard signs are 12” x 18” and 18” x 24”. We also provide sizes ranging from 12” x 12” to 48” x 96” to fit different needs.

Are yard signs an effective way to advertise my small business?

Yes, yard signs are a great way to promote your small business, especially for services like lawn care or daycare. They are perfect for placing outside your business or giving to customers.

Can I order extra yard sign stakes?

Yes, you can buy extra stakes and other accessories from our Accessories page.

Do you offer blank yard signs?

Yes, we do! Just create your design without any graphics or backgrounds and proceed to checkout..

What types of yard stakes do you offer?

We offer yard sign stakes in these sizes:

  • 10” x 15”
  • 10” x 24”
  • 10” x 30”
  • 27” Beefy Stakes

Can my custom yard signs be printed double-sided?

Yes, your custom signs can be printed on both sides. To prevent scratches, we recommend using cloth between the signs during storage.

What colors do you use to print your lawn signs?

We use CMYK (cyan, magenta, yellow, and black) for vibrant printing with UV and fade-resistant inks.

Can I use my yard signs repeatedly?

Yes, if stored and maintained properly, our signs can be used multiple times.

Do you offer bulk pricing?

Yes, we offer discounts for bulk orders. The more yard signs you buy, the bigger the discount.

Can I use yard signs indoors?

Yes, while designed for outdoor use, yard signs can also be used indoors as temporary signage similar to posters or foam board displays.

Do you offer business-specific design templates?

Yes, we have many business-specific templates available, including options for real estate, political, contractors, and more.

Installation & Product Care FAQs

What is the best way to install custom lawn signs?

To install, simply insert the wire stakes into the sign’s flutes and then push the stakes into the ground at your desired height.

Are there ways to display my sign without stakes?

Yes, you can use the “corner grommets” option to add grommets to the corners of your sign for different display methods.

How should my signs be stored?

Store your signs in a dry, consistent-temperature area. Avoid bending or folding them to prevent damage.

Are your yard signs weather-resistant?

Yes, our signs are weather-resistant and waterproof. However, because they are lightweight, they can be blown away in strong winds.

Common Uses

What are some common uses for custom yard signs?

Custom yard signs are versatile and used for real estate, garage sales, political campaigns, business openings, and parties. They’re an effective and visible way to promote various events and services.
